title: An Angel from Texas
writer: Fred Niblo Jr., Bertram Millhauser, George S. Kaufman
actors: Eddie Albert, Rosemary Lane, Wayne Morris
plot: Stage struck Lydia Weston leaves her small Texas town for Broadway. Left behind is her steady beau Peter. Lydia sends letters and news clippings back home telling everyone she's now a big star. Peter soon heads to New York to surp...
